transcript: This is 327. I'm going in. Good luck, Agent. Hello. Oh, I was just admiring the art. Here it comes. Please. Such a lovely place you've got here. Is it usually this empty just a trim, please Porous agent, Kratos I don't know what to do with you, but I'm going to kill you. Oh, my God. Chief, do you copy? I need backup. What are you doing? No, I just wanted a haircut! Looks like we've found our next recruit. Doctor, carry on with the procedure. We have to make room for Agent 327. We'll see you next time.
